title: Akshar Learning Hub Frontend Redesign with Neon-Accented Theme

requirements.summary: Redesign entire frontend with bright, energetic neon-accented color palette (electric cyan, neon yellow-green, hot pink, vivid orange) on clean white background using Poppins/Nunito typography and modern Lucide icons
acceptanceCriteria: Neon accent colors are visibly present across sections (buttons, highlights, badges, borders)
Overall layout remains clean and minimalistic
Typography uses Poppins and/or Nunito
Icons are modern and consistent throughout

file_operations.description: Add neon accent color CSS custom properties (--neon-cyan: oklch(0.75 0.2 195), --neon-yellow-green: oklch(0.85 0.22 135), --neon-pink: oklch(0.7 0.3 350), --neon-orange: oklch(0.75 0.22 45)) and update existing theme tokens to integrate these colors for primary accents, borders, and highlights while keeping the base background light/white

Extend theme colors to include neon accent variants (neonCyan, neonYellow, neonPink, neonOrange) mapped to the CSS custom properties, ensure Poppins and Nunito are primary font families, and add utility classes for neon glow effects (box-shadow with neon colors)

requirements.summary: Build Hero/Home landing section displaying Akshar Learning Hub firm name, compelling tagline, brief intro, and two CTA buttons (Book Free Demo, Explore Programs) with energetic neon-accented styling and animations
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays firm name Akshar Learning Hub prominently
Tagline and brief description are present
Book Free Demo and Explore Programs CTA buttons are visible
Section uses neon-accented design with animations

file_operations.description: Replace existing hero content to prominently display Akshar Learning Hub as the main headline, add a compelling tagline about tutoring excellence for grades 1-8, include a brief introduction paragraph about the services, replace existing CTAs with Book Free Demo (scrolls to contact) and Explore Programs (scrolls to services) buttons styled with neon accent colors and glow effects, integrate the generated hero banner image from frontend/public/assets/generated/akshar-hero.dim_1440x900.png as background or featured visual, and add fade-in/slide-up animations on mount

requirements.summary: Build About section highlighting positive learning environment with focus on student discipline, attention to detail, life skills, social growth, and confidence, including placeholder testimonial-style highlights
acceptanceCriteria: About section covers discipline, life skills, confidence, social growth
Positive environment messaging is clearly communicated
Section uses modern card or highlight layouts

file_operations.description: Replace existing about content to emphasize Akshar Learning Hub positive learning environment, create four highlight cards covering: (1) Student Discipline and Focus, (2) Attention to Detail (avoiding silly mistakes), (3) Life Skills and Social Growth, (4) Building Student Confidence, each with a modern Lucide icon, title, and short description, include 2-3 placeholder testimonial-style quotes from students/parents praising the environment, integrate the generated about illustration from frontend/public/assets/generated/akshar-about.dim_900x700.png, and apply neon-accented borders/highlights with fade-up scroll animations

requirements.summary: Build five individual service sections/cards for After School Tuitions (Grade 1-8), Phonics program, Maths coaching, Special Subject Mentoring, and Scholarship/Exam Prep (Grade 5-10), each with dedicated layout, description, grade range, and modern icon
acceptanceCriteria: Five separate service cards/sections are rendered
Each service has a title, description, grade range, and modern icon
Scholarship and Exam Prep clearly targets Grade 5–10
Phonics and Maths are listed as standalone services

file_operations.description: Create a new Services section component displaying five distinct service cards in a responsive grid layout: (1) After School Education Support (Tuitions) - Grades 1-8 with GraduationCap icon, (2) Phonics Program - Early learners with Volume2 icon, (3) Maths Coaching - All grades with Calculator icon, (4) Special Subject Mentoring - Personalized support with Users icon, (5) Scholarship and Exam Preparation - Grades 5-10 with Trophy icon. Each card includes service title, detailed description (2-3 sentences), target grade range badge, modern Lucide icon at top, and neon-accented borders/highlights. Use a two-column or three-column responsive grid with fade-up animations on scroll.
Import and add the new Services component after the About section and before Testimonials, ensuring smooth scroll navigation integration and proper section ID for header navigation

requirements.summary: Build Testimonials/Results section with 4-6 placeholder testimonial cards showing student and parent success stories in carousel or grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 placeholder testimonial cards are shown
Each card has a name, role (parent or student), and quote
Layout is carousel or responsive grid

file_operations.description: Expand existing testimonials component to include 6 placeholder testimonial cards (mix of 3 parents and 3 students from grades 3-8), each card displaying name, role (Parent of Grade X Student or Grade X Student), a positive quote about discipline/confidence/results, and a star rating. Keep the carousel navigation but ensure all cards display in grid on larger screens. Add neon-accented quote styling, modern avatar placeholders using Lucide User icon, and integrate the generated testimonials background from frontend/public/assets/generated/akshar-testimonials.dim_1440x600.png as a subtle background element

requirements.summary: Build Downloads section with three categories: Free Downloads (direct), Sign-up Required Downloads (OTP gated), and Paid Downloads (redirect to payment), with placeholder cards for future materials
acceptanceCriteria: Three clearly labelled download categories are present: Free, Sign-up Required, Paid
Free download buttons work directly
Sign-up required downloads trigger the OTP modal before unlocking
Paid download buttons navigate to the Payment page
Placeholder cards for future uploads are visible with labels

file_operations.description: Replace existing phonics-only downloads with a three-tabbed interface: (1) Free Downloads tab showing 3-4 placeholder cards (Phonics Workbook Level 1, Maths Worksheet Grade 3, etc.) with direct download buttons using Download icon, (2) Sign-up Required tab showing 3-4 placeholder cards (Advanced Phonics Materials, Exam Papers Grade 5) with Lock icon and Unlock with Sign-up buttons that trigger the OTP modal, (3) Paid Downloads tab showing 2-3 placeholder cards (Complete Question Bank, Scholarship Prep Kit) with IndianRupee icon and Purchase buttons that navigate to /payment route. Each card includes material name, grade level, brief description, and appropriate CTA button. Apply neon-accented styling and use Tabs component from shadcn/ui.
Ensure Downloads component is positioned after Services/Testimonials sections with proper section ID, and verify smooth scroll navigation from header works correctly

requirements.summary: Implement frontend OTP verification modal for sign-up gated downloads, collecting name/email/phone, validating formats (email and 10-digit Indian mobile), displaying simulated 6-digit OTP on-screen, and verifying OTP entry to unlock downloads
acceptanceCriteria: Modal collects name, email, and phone
Email format and 10-digit phone validation are enforced
A 6-digit OTP is generated and displayed on-screen after form submission
OTP entry field appears after submission
Correct OTP unlocks the download; incorrect OTP shows an error
User email and phone are stored in the Motoko backend actor
UI clearly states OTP is simulated

file_operations.description: Create a modal component using shadcn/ui Dialog that handles the OTP flow: (1) Initial form collecting name (text), email (validated with regex), and phone (validated as 10-digit number starting with 6-9), (2) On submit, call backend registerUser function using the backend interface, display the returned 6-digit OTP prominently in the UI with a clear note indicating OTP would be sent via SMS in production - displayed here for demo purposes, (3) Show OTP input field (6 digits) with a verify button, (4) On verify button click, call backend verifyOTP function, (5) If verification succeeds, show success message and trigger download callback, close modal, (6) If verification fails, show error toast indicating incorrect OTP, (7) Apply neon-accented styling to buttons and borders, use Lucide icons (Mail, Phone, Lock), and ensure mobile-responsive layout

Import OTPModal component, add state to manage modal open/close and selected download item, wire Unlock with Sign-up buttons in the Sign-up Required tab to open the OTPModal with the appropriate download callback that triggers when OTP verification succeeds

requirements.summary: Build Payment page displaying placeholder UPI QR code, UPI ID field, payment instructions, and WhatsApp link for post-payment material delivery confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: Payment page shows a placeholder QR code image
Placeholder UPI ID is displayed with an edit note
Payment instructions are clearly written
WhatsApp link for post-payment contact is present

file_operations.description: Create a Payment page component displaying: (1) Page title Complete Your Purchase, (2) The generated UPI QR placeholder image from frontend/public/assets/generated/payment-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png (if available, otherwise use a placeholder rectangle with text), (3) Placeholder UPI ID field showing aksharlearning@upi with an edit note indicating to replace with actual UPI ID, (4) Step-by-step payment instructions: Scan QR code or use UPI ID, Complete payment via your UPI app, Take a screenshot of payment confirmation, Contact us on WhatsApp to receive your materials, (5) WhatsApp contact button linking to wa.me/917718823635 with pre-filled message indicating payment completion for material, (6) Apply neon-accented card styling, use Lucide icons (QrCode, Smartphone, CheckCircle), and ensure mobile-responsive layout

Import React Router (react-router-dom) if not already present, wrap the app content in a BrowserRouter, create Routes with Route for / (home/all sections) and /payment (Payment component), ensure navigation from Paid Downloads buttons uses navigate() or Link to /payment, and maintain smooth scroll behavior for home page section navigation

requirements.summary: Build Contact section with phone 7718823635 (clickable tel link), WhatsApp link with pre-filled message, address Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019 (no email), using modern card/icon layout with neon accents
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number 7718823635 is displayed and clickable (tel: link)
WhatsApp button links to wa.me/917718823635 with a pre-filled message
Address Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019 is shown
No email address is displayed
Section uses modern icon and card layout

file_operations.description: Replace existing contact section content: (1) Remove any email field/display completely, (2) Display phone number 7718823635 as a clickable tel: link with Phone icon, (3) Add WhatsApp button linking to wa.me/917718823635 with pre-filled message indicating inquiry about Akshar Learning Hub programs, styled with neon-green accent, (4) Display address Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019 with MapPin icon in a card, (5) Keep the contact form if it exists but remove email field from it OR replace form entirely with just the info cards and WhatsApp CTA, (6) Apply neon-accented borders to contact info cards, use modern Lucide icons throughout, ensure mobile-responsive two-column layout

requirements.summary: Build fixed floating WhatsApp button visible on all pages linking to wa.me/917718823635 with pre-filled inquiry message
acceptanceCriteria: Floating WhatsApp button is always visible on screen
Clicking opens WhatsApp with the correct number and a pre-filled message
Button does not obstruct main content significantly

file_operations.description: Update existing WhatsAppButton component to ensure: (1) Link points to wa.me/917718823635, (2) Pre-filled message indicates inquiry about Akshar Learning Hub tutoring programs, (3) Button is fixed position (bottom-right corner with z-index above other content), (4) Uses neon-green accent color with glow effect on hover, (5) Displays WhatsApp icon (MessageCircle or use SVG), (6) Includes a subtle pulse animation to draw attention, (7) Remains visible and accessible on mobile devices without blocking key UI elements

requirements.summary: Build responsive fixed navigation header with logo/name, nav links to all sections (Home, About, Services, Downloads, Contact), neon-accented Enroll Now CTA button, and mobile hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: Header is fixed at the top on scroll
Nav links scroll smoothly to each section
Enroll Now button is prominently styled with neon accent
Mobile hamburger menu works on small screens

file_operations.description: Update existing header component: (1) Replace logo/branding with Akshar Learning Hub text or integrate the generated logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/akshar-logo.dim_400x400.png if suitable, (2) Update nav links array to include: Home (scroll to hero), About (scroll to about), Services (scroll to services), Downloads (scroll to downloads), Contact (scroll to contact), (3) Replace existing CTA button with Enroll Now button styled with neon accent color (pink or cyan) and glow effect, linking to contact section, (4) Ensure header is fixed (sticky) at top with backdrop blur for modern effect, (5) Verify mobile hamburger menu functionality with smooth slide-in/out animation, (6) Apply neon-accented underline effect on active/hover nav links, ensure header remains visible and accessible across all pages/routes

requirements.summary: Build site Footer with branding, quick nav links, programs/services list, and contact info (phone and address only, no email), including WhatsApp link
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays firm name and tagline
Quick nav links are present
All services are listed
Phone and address are shown; no email
WhatsApp link is included

file_operations.description: Update existing footer component: (1) Ensure branding section displays Akshar Learning Hub name and tagline Excellence in Education for Grades 1-8, (2) Quick Links column: Home, About, Services, Downloads, Contact (scroll links), (3) Programs/Services column: list all five services (After School Tuitions, Phonics Program, Maths Coaching, Special Subject Mentoring, Scholarship and Exam Prep), (4) Contact column: Phone 7718823635 (tel: link), Address Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019, WhatsApp button/link to wa.me/917718823635, (5) Remove any email display or email link, (6) Apply neon-accented dividers and links with hover glow effects, use four-column responsive grid collapsing to single column on mobile, add copyright line Akshar Learning Hub. All rights reserved.
